questions.question: I can see the issues - the formatCurrency function is removing decimal places (showing $0 instead of $0.00), the styling isn't matching the existing cards, and the layout needs adjustment. What would you prefer for the currency display format?

options.label: €0.00 (European style)
options.description: Use euro symbol instead of dollar

questions.question: The Smart Savings Monitor needs to match the dark theme and card layout of existing components. What visual style would you prefer?

options.label: Match existing card style exactly
options.description: Use same borders, shadows, and colors as other cards

options.label: Emphasize with accent colors
options.description: Make savings card stand out with green/red highlights

options.label: Minimal design
options.description: Clean, subtle styling with minimal decoration
